title: create aeronautica modpack
description: A Create modpack with Create Aeronautics, focused on automation, machines and flying contraptions.
body:
# Create Aeronautica is a modpack built around Create Aeronautics, expanding engineering and building possibilities within the Create ecosystem.
# 
The modpack allows players to build a wide range of mechanical systems, automated factories, and moving contraptions. With Create Aeronautics, you can create flying devices, airships, transportation systems, and complex mechanical builds.

The pack also includes many Create addons that expand the gameplay with new mechanics, blocks, tools, production systems, and automation upgrades.

In addition to engineering and building, the pack supports survival gameplay and exploration, featuring various generated structures that can be discovered and integrated into your projects.

Suitable for both singleplayer and multiplayer servers focused on creativity, engineering, and mechanical construction.
